reasoning: Spain and France are virtual co-favorites on prediction markets, with Spain edging ahead at roughly 17.7% versus France's 17.1%, and Spain riding a 31-game unbeaten streak plus a Euro 2024 title under a settled, deep squad. France's blend of elite talent (Mbappe, Dembele, Tchouameni) and back-to-back final appearances makes them the clearest threat, with Portugal having jumped England into third on the board. Brazil look shaky after a 1-1 draw with Morocco and Neymar fitness doubts, while Spain's main concern is Yamal managing a knock and the loss of Fermin Lopez to depth. Morocco are the standout live outsider: 2022 semifinalists with much of that core intact and Regragui's discipline, though their tough Group C path (Brazil, Scotland) is a hurdle. With the pre-tournament favorite winning only once in the last six editions and just eight matches played, confidence is necessarily tempered.
